originatingBug: Verdict is 'proven' when Z3 result matches expected, 'violation' when they differ, 'error' otherwise

declarations: (declare-const expected_unsat Bool) (declare-const z3_result_unsat Bool) (declare-const verdict_proven Bool) (assert (and expected_unsat (not z3_result_unsat) verdict_proven))
smt.assertion: (declare-const expected_unsat Bool) (declare-const z3_result_unsat Bool) (declare-const verdict_proven Bool) (assert (and expected_unsat (not z3_result_unsat) verdict_proven))
